title: Crispy Earthy Japanese Rice Bowl
description: A lowsodium, postworkout bowl with fluffy rice, sauteed shiitake mushrooms, spinach, and a tangy rice wine glaze, topped with toasted sesame seeds for a crisp finish.
instructions: Rinse the rice under cold water until clear, then drain.

Combine rice, water, and rice wine in a saucepan. Bring to a boil over medium‑high heat, reduce to low, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes. Remove from heat, let sit covered 10 minutes, then fluff with a fork.
While the rice cooks, heat sesame oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add minced ginger and garlic, sauté 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add sliced mushrooms to the skillet, stir‑fry 3‑4 minutes until browned. Stir in soy sauce and sugar, cooking another minute.
Fold in the spinach, cooking until just wilted, about 1‑2 minutes. Remove from heat.
To assemble, place the fluffy rice in a bowl, top with the mushroom‑spinach mixture, and drizzle any remaining sauce over the top.
Sprinkle toasted sesame seeds over the bowl and serve immediately.
